viral_opportunities.title:
@Architizer: Author: @Architizer | Text: #ArchitizerAwards

Started as a design-build project...
viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @Architizer | Text: #ArchitizerAwards

Started as a design-build project with architecture students, this house evolved through the act of building, giving the team room to test new construction methods and refine the design on site.

📍 Terence Bay, Canada
Project by: Peter Braithwaite Studio
Details: | URL: https://x.com/Architizer/status/2073708681435209940 | Date: 2026-07-05 | Likes: 98 | Retweets: 15 | Replies: 1 | Views: 6492 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @Architizer

viral_reply.body: Love that the design refined itself on site — building as a way of thinking. The craft that comes out of that hands-on iteration really shows here.

viral_opportunities.title: @10News: Author: @10News | Text: A Vista homeowner's insurance premium jumped from $900 t...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @10News | Text: A Vista homeowner's insurance premium jumped from $900 to $4,000 after being dropped by Farmer's Insurance and placed on California's FAIR Plan — with another rate hike of up to 50% expected in October. | URL: https://x.com/10News/status/2072840367834030175 | Date: 2026-07-03 | Likes: 58 | Retweets: 22 | Replies: 35 | Views: 12879 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @10News

viral_reply.body: The FAIR Plan squeeze is real. Worth noting non-combustible assemblies and verified WPH Plus measures can move underwriting outcomes — a lever that's underused in this debate.

viral_opportunities.title: @Heather_Horton: Author: @Heather_Horton | Text: “The only way to make sense out of change is to...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @Heather_Horton | Text: “The only way to make sense out of change is to plunge into it, move with it, and join the dance.” ~Alan Watts “The Chameleon”, oil on panel, 30”x30”, private collection, Malibu, CA. 🔴 | URL: https://x.com/Heather_Horton/status/2074591458955596078 | Date: 2026-07-07 | Likes: 9 | Retweets: 1 | Replies: 0 | Views: 174 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @Heather_Horton

viral_reply.body: Beautiful piece — that Watts line and the stillness in the panel really sit together. Malibu's the right home for it.

Author: @OneKindesign | Text: Luxury contemporary home in California offers breathtaking valley views

viral_reply.why: CA luxury contemporary home, buyer audience

viral_opportunities.query: building a fire resistant home California
viral_opportunities.title: @zaggrim: Author: @zaggrim | Text: Considering how the CA govt likes to leave their water...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @zaggrim | Text: Considering how the CA govt likes to leave their water reservoirs at like 5% capacity, sprinkler systems will likely fail. If they are smart, the people rebuilding will use stone, concrete, carbonized wood siding or some other fire retardant materials. | URL: https://x.com/zaggrim/status/2072936275145810392 | Date: 2026-07-03 | Likes: 0 | Retweets: 0 | Replies: 0 | Views: 9 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @zaggrim

viral_reply.body: Agreed on material choice mattering more than sprinklers. Reinforced concrete and non-combustible assemblies carry the load when water and power can't be relied on.

viral_opportunities.title: @realmatt_re: Author: @realmatt_re | Text: Your "fixed" mortgage payment is a lie - especially...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @realmatt_re | Text: Your "fixed" mortgage payment is a lie - especially in California. Avg homeowner insurance premiums are up 84% since 2020. The CA FAIR plan is at near 700k policies alone and is raising rates ~30% in October. Home ownership cost overall has far outpaced inflation... | URL: https://x.com/realmatt_re/status/2069122159130341682 | Date: 2026-06-22 | Likes: 6 | Retweets: 3 | Replies: 3 | Views: 398 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @realmatt_re

viral_reply.body: The insurance line is the real story in ownership cost now. Non-combustible construction is one of the few variables an owner can actually change to improve underwriting.
